name: @shadow-library/app
description: A progressive Node.js framework for building efficient, scalable, and enterprise-grade applications using SOLID principles

scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: bun test tests/decorators tests/injector tests/utils tests/injection-token.spec.ts tests/shadow-application.spec.ts tests/shadow-factory.spec.ts --coverage
